description:
5V/3.3V Power multiplexer schematic
Configured to use automatic switching: VIN1 priority

Acceptable input range is 1.6 to 5.5 volts
The user needs to set resistor values depending on which input voltage is being used
Some pre-calculated values are:
5V: R1=16k, R2=4.3k
3v3: R1=2k, R2=1k
